# dnacenter_lan_automation_delete (Data Source)

It performs delete operation on LAN Automation.

- Invoke this API to stop LAN Automation for the given site

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "dnaclan_automation_delete" "example" {
  provider = dnac
  id       = "string"
  item {

    # detail = ------
    # error_code = ------
    # message = ------
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- **id** (String) id path parameter. LAN Automation Id needs to be retrived via /dna/intent/status

### Read-Only

- **item** (List of Object) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--item))

<a id="nestedatt--item"></a>
### Nested Schema for `item`

Read-Only:

- **detail** (String)
- **error_code** (String)
- **message** (String)
